oil-and-vinegar-potato-salad.name: Oil And Vinegar Potato Salad
instructions: Cook potatoes in large pot of boiling salted water until tender, about 30 minutes. Drain. Cool to just warm, 10 to 15 minutes; peel potatoes. Cut each potato in half, then cut into 1/3-inch slices.

Place warm potatoes in large bowl. Stir red wine vinegar and sugar in small bowl until sugar dissolves, then drizzle over potatoes. Toss to coat. Mix in onion slices. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Cool to room temperature.
Add olive oil and parsley to potatoes. Toss well and let marinate at least 20 minutes and up to 2 hours at room temperature.

one-pot-jambalaya.name: One Pot Jambalaya

ingredients.prep: kosher and freshly cracked black pepper, to taste

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp oil in a crockpot or large, deep saute pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken and sausage and saute for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and the sausage is lightly browned. Transfer to a clean plate and set aside.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil to the crockpot. Add bell peppers, jalapeño, onion and garlic. Sauté for 6 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the onions are softened.

Add the diced tomatoes, chicken stock, rice, Cajun seasoning, thyme, cayenne, bay leaf, and stir to combine. Continue cooking until the mixture reaches a simmer. Then reduce heat to medium-low, cover and simmer for about 25-30 minutes, or until the rice is nearly cooked through, stirring every 5 minutes or so along the way so that the rice does not burn.

Add the shrimp, ham, okra, and stir to combine. Continue to simmer, stirring occasionally, until the shrimp are cooked through and pink. Stir in the chicken and sausage, and remove and discard the bay leaf.
Taste season the jambalaya with salt, pepper, and additional Cajun seasoning if needed. Remove from heat and serve warm.

one-pan-sausage-and-veggies.name: One-pan Sausage And Veggies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C).
Spread the potatoes, zucchini, yellow squash, red bell pepper, onion, and sausages on an 18 x 13-inch baking sheet. Add the olive oil, garlic, diced tomatoes, salt, and pepper and toss to combine.
Bake for 1 hour, until the veggies are tender and the sausage is browned.
Enjoy!

onion-mini-buns-lezzet.name: Onion Mini Buns
instructions: 1. Special recipes for five tea.
2. Crochet onions 1 finger thickness.
3. From May to the coast.
4. Melt the butter and soak onions.
5. Add Maydanoz, salt, blind and grated cheese.
6. Leave to cool.
7. Mix the flour, milk, water, salt and baking powder in a container and hold it in the refrigerator for 30 minutes by squeezing fatigue and stretch foil.
8. Cut the triangle slices with dough roller on the unified countertop.
9. broadcast on slices of tribute with onions.
10. Wrap in roll shape by wide.
11. 11. The oily paper is stripped into the tray, the powder red pepper is sprinkled.
12. Cook until the oven, set to 200 degrees, until the uniforms are fried.
12. August Serve.

open-faced-pepper-pie-argiro.name: Open-faced Pepper Pie
instructions: Sauté the peppers first for a few minutes with a tablespoon of the Melted butter until soft.
Let them cool.
Add the parsley and paprika and mix.
We open the candaifi. We scrape it into small pieces.
Put it on the counter a little bit to dry.
In bowls, beat the eggs, milk, yogurt and melted butter to connect. Salt and pepper.
Add the peppers, cheeses and seeds to the mixture. Mix well.
Finally, add the dry leaf.
Mix very well and spread on a thin layer, in a oily baking pan.
Sprinkle with the cornice and sprinkle with the fingers with some water.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 180 degrees C for about 50 minutes, until the surface is golden.

orange-iced-tea.name: Orange Iced Tea
instructions: Place tea bags and sugar in a large heatproof pitcher or measuring glass and pour 7 cups boiling water over; stir to dissolve sugar. Let steep 15 minutes.
Remove tea bags and stir in orange-flower water, half of orange slices, and 4 mint sprigs. Chill 4–8 hours.
Strain tea into ice-filled glasses and garnish drinks with remaining orange slices and more mint sprigs.

orange-mousse-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Orange Mousse ( Recipe)

ingredients.item: Skinless orange beans and basil leaves to decorate

instructions: Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water for a few minutes. Wash the oranges thoroughly, remove their lumps and cut them into pieces. Lie in a container and crush them with the magic wand. Add condensed milk and mix.
Escorra as folhas de gelatina e derreta-as no micro-ondas ou em banho-maria, sem deixar ferver. Junte ao preparado anterior, envolvendo muito bem.

On the other hand, beat the cream until it is creamy and then wrap it carefully in the orange preparation. Take it to the fridge for about three hours. Serve the mousse decorated with skinless orange buds and basil leaves.

orange-rhubarb-cardamom-jam.name: Orange-rhubarb-cardamom Jam
instructions: Inspect six half-pint jars for cracks and rings for rust, discarding any defective ones. Immerse in simmering water until jam is ready. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.
Whisk sugar, pectin, and ground cardamom together in a small bowl.

Combine rhubarb, orange zest, and orange segments in a wide, nonreactive 8-quart pot: stir in pectin mixture to combine. Bring to a vigorous boil over high heat. Reduce heat to medium-high and cook, stirring frequently and adjusting heat as needed to maintain a gentle boil, until reduced by at least one-third, 20 to 25 minutes.

Pack jam into hot, sterilized jars, filling to within ¼ inch of tops. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around insides of jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water; bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 10 minutes.

Remove jars from stockpot; rest several inches apart, for 12 to 24 hours. Press center of each lid with a finger to ensure lid does not move up or down. Remove rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area.

orecchiette-with-traditional-puglia-cime.name: Orecchiette With Traditional Puglia Cime Di Rapa
orecchiette-with-traditional-puglia-cime.original_name: Orecchiette con cime di rapa tradicional de Puglia

ingredients.item: 400 g de orecchiette (pueden ser frescas o secas)
500 g de cime di rapa limpias (o grelos/nabizas como alternativa)
4 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
2 cucharadas de pan rallado tostado (opcional, para servir)

instructions: We washed well the cime di rapa and removed the toughest stems, leaving the leaves and the tender flowers.
En una olla grande con abundante agua con sal, cocemos las cime di rapa durante unos 5 minutos.
In that same pot, we add the orecchiette and cook all together following as long as the pasta package indicates (about 10-12 minutes if dry).

While we cook the dough with the vegetable, we heat up olive oil in a large frying pan. We add the laminated garlic, anchovies and guindilla and let them get cold with medium heat till the garlic's golden and the anchovies get rid of.
We scattering the dough with the cime di rapa and passing it directly to the frying pan with the sodith. We have been pounding them all together for a few minutes to get their flavors mixed up.
Servimos caliente, con un poco de pan rallado tostado por encima si queremos darle un toque crujiente.

oven-baked-cod-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Oven Baked Cod - Recipe
oven-baked-cod-recipe-teleculinaria.original_name: Bacalhau assado no forno - receita simples
instructions: No fundo de um tabuleiro ou travessa de forno, espalhe as cebolas cortadas em meias-luas e os alhos fatiados.
Limpe os pimentos, corte-os em tiras e coloque-as por cima da cebola e do alho. Tempere com sal e pimenta.
Lay out the cod posts, with the skin facts down, on the vegetable bed and water with plenty of olive oil. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180 Serves with tasteful accompaniment.

oven-roasted-cabbage.name: Oven-roasted Cabbage

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Stir cabbage, chicken broth, onion, butter, bacon, seasoned salt, salt, and black pepper together in a 9x13-inch baking dish. Cover the dish with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until cabbage is tender, 1 ½ to 2 hours.
